summary: S3REnR integration testing completed successfully. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend displays S3REnR data correctly: regional summary panel (IDF SATURE, PACA ACTIF, HdF ACTIF), color-coded postes on map (green=disponible, orange=contraint, red=saturé), MW labels on direct matches (CALAIS 28MW, VALENCIENNES 65MW), and S3REnR legend. Existing map layers (parcels, lines, cables, DCs) still work correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/s3renr/summary returns 200 with IDF, PACA, HdF regions
Backend: IDF region shows SATURE status with 0 MW dispo and 10 saturated postes
Backend: PACA region shows ACTIF status with 3258 MW dispo, 52 disponible postes
Backend: HdF region shows ACTIF status with 2925 MW dispo, 58 disponible postes
Backend: GET /api/s3renr/top-opportunities returns sorted list by MW descending
Backend: Top opportunities respect min_mw filter parameter
Backend: GET /api/map/electrical-assets returns postes enriched with s3renr field
Backend: Poste Calais has direct S3REnR match (28 MW dispo, etat=disponible, score_dc=6)
Backend: Poste Valenciennes has direct S3REnR match (65 MW dispo, etat=disponible, score_dc=7)
Backend: IDF postes show region-level sature status (no direct match)
Backend: Existing endpoints still work (61 DC, 15 cables, 8 landing points, lignes 400kV/225kV)
Frontend: S3REnR section visible in sidebar
Frontend: IDF region shows SATURE badge with 0 MW dispo, 10 postes
Frontend: PACA region shows ACTIF badge with 3258 MW dispo, 76 postes
Frontend: HdF region shows ACTIF badge with 2925 MW dispo, 66 postes
Frontend: S3REnR legend shows Disponible (green), Contraint (orange), Saturé (red)
Frontend: MW labels visible on map for direct matches (28MW, 65MW)
Frontend: Status bar shows 101 postes, 61 DC, 8 LP
Frontend: Color-coded postes visible on map (green/orange/red based on S3REnR status)
seed_data_creation: No seed data - S3REnR data is static in-memory from /app/backend/s3renr_data.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: S3REnR integration is fully working. Backend enriches HTB postes with S3REnR data via /api/map/electrical-assets. Direct matches (CALAIS, VALENCIENNES in HdF) show MW labels. IDF postes get region-level 'sature' status. New endpoints: /api/s3renr/summary (per-region stats) and /api/s3renr/top-opportunities (ranked DC-suitable postes). Frontend shows S3REnR regional summary panel, color-coded postes, and legend.

s3renr_verification.idf_status: SATURE (0 MW dispo, 10 postes all saturated)
s3renr_verification.paca_status: ACTIF (3258 MW dispo, 76 postes: 52 dispo, 12 contraint, 12 sature)
s3renr_verification.hdf_status: ACTIF (2925 MW dispo, 66 postes: 58 dispo, 3 contraint, 5 sature)
